title: SEO Analyzer Input
description: Configure which URLs to audit and what analysis depth to perform.

urls.title: URLs to Analyze
urls.description: List of webpage URLs to run SEO audits on. Accepts full URLs (https://example.com/page).

analysisType.title: Analysis Type
analysisType.description: 'full' returns all 15+ SEO factors with scoring. 'basic' returns only title, meta description, and headings for faster runs.

fetchTimeoutMs.title: Fetch Timeout (ms)
fetchTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a page to load before timing out.
